title: RABA Responsibility Event
description: Structured event representing a responsibility-relevant state transition or governance event in an AI-supported workflow.

event_id.description: Unique identifier of the responsibility event.

timestamp.description: Time when the responsibility event occurred.

schema_version.description: Schema version used by the event.

workflow_id.description: Workflow or business process where the event occurred.

action_id.description: Specific AI-supported action associated with the event.

agent_id.description: AI agent, workflow, runtime or automation involved.

current_state.description: Current RABA state after the event.

previous_state.description: Previous RABA state before the event.

risk_level.description: Risk level assigned to the action or event.

human_owner_role.description: Human role accountable for the action or workflow.

authorizer_id.description: Identifier of the authorizer, if applicable.

authorizer_role.description: Role of the authorizer, if applicable.

decision_reason.description: Human-readable reason for approval, rejection, escalation, block or override.

policy_reference.description: Policy or rule involved in the event.
